---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

What feature or improvement are you proposing?

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve or what experience does it improve?

## Proposed Solution

How do you envision this working? Include mockups, examples, or references if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Milestone

Which milestone does this fit under?
- [ ] Polish & UX Pass
- [ ] Social & Community
- [ ] Competitive Play
- [ ] Content & Customization
- [ ] App Store Launch
- [ ] AI Mastery
- [ ] Other / New
